agents.name: CSV Cleaner
agents.description: Cleans messy CSV files and outputs structured, normalized data.

agents.name: Chart Generator
agents.description: Turns cleaned tabular data into charts and visualizations.

agents.name: Web Scraper
agents.description: Fetches and extracts content from a URL.

agents.name: Summarizer
agents.description: Summarizes long text into concise bullet points.

agents.name: Notion Writer
agents.description: Creates or updates a Notion page with structured content.

agents.name: PDF Extractor
agents.description: Extracts text and key sections from PDF files.

agents.name: Email Sender
agents.description: Sends emails with structured content and attachments.

paths.label: Clean CSV → Charts
paths.notes: Good for messy operational exports that need quick visualization.

paths.label: Scrape → Summarize → Notion
paths.notes: Ideal for turning websites into internal knowledge pages.

paths.label: PDF → Insights → Email
paths.notes: Great for reports, research, and long documents.

paths.label: Generate Image → Upload to Drive
paths.notes: Useful for marketing assets and creative workflows.
